mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STFF_CAND (STFF_TYPE_CD, STFF_NM, STFF_EXP_YR, OVRL_RTG, SIGN_BONUS, ANSL_SAL) VALUES
(#{c.stffTypeCd}, #{c.stffNm}, #{c.stffExpYr}, #{c.ovrlRtg}, #{c.signBonus}, #{c.anslSal})

INSERT INTO STFF_CAND_ABLT (CAND_ID, STFF_ABLT_CD, STFF_ABLT_VAL) VALUES
(#{a.candId}, #{a.stffAbltCd}, #{a.stffAbltVal})
mapper.select: SELECT CA.CAND_ID, CA.STFF_ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS STFF_ABLT_NM, CA.STFF_ABLT_VAL FROM STFF_CAND_ABLT CA LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'STFF_ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = CA.STFF_ABLT_CD WHERE CA.CAND_ID = #{candId} ORDER BY CA.STFF_ABLT_VAL DESC
SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID'
SELECT SSNT_YR FROM SSNT ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CUR_DT FROM SSNT ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STFF (STFF_NM, STFF_TYPE_CD, STFF_EXP_YR, STFF_ANSL_SAL, STFF_STTS_CD, TM_ID) VALUES (#{stffNm}, #{stffTypeCd}, #{stffExpYr}, #{anslSal}, 'AT', #{tmId})
INSERT INTO STFF_TM (STFF_ID, TM_ID, STFF_BGNG_DT) VALUES (#{stffId}, #{tmId}, #{bgngDt})
INSERT INTO STFF_TM_CNTRCT (STFF_ID, TM_ID, CNTRCT_BGNG_DT, ANSL_SAL, SIGN_BONUS, CNTRCT_END_DT) VALUES (#{stffId}, #{tmId}, #{bgngDt}, #{anslSal}, #{signBonus}, DATE_ADD(#{bgngDt}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR))

INSERT INTO STFF_ABLT (STFF_ID, STFF_ABLT_CD, STFF_ABLT_VAL) VALUES
(#{a.stffId}, #{a.stffAbltCd}, #{a.stffAbltVal})
mapper.update: UPDATE STFF SET STFF_STTS_CD = 'FA', TM_ID = NULL WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} AND STFF_TYPE_CD = #{stffTypeCd} AND STFF_STTS_CD = 'AT'

INSERT INTO TM_FNC_SSNT (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, STFF_COST) VALUES (#{tmId}, #{ssntYr}, #{amount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STFF_COST = COALESCE(STFF_COST, 0) + VALUES(STFF_COST), CUR_CASH = COALESCE(CUR_CASH, 0) - VALUES(STFF_COST)
mapper.select: SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = #{cfgKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS) VALUES (#{evnt.ssntYr}, #{evnt.evntDt}, #{evnt.tmId}, #{evnt.evntTypeCd}, #{evnt.evntTtlt}, #{evnt.evntCnts})
mapper.select: SELECT TM_ID, TM_KR_NM AS TM_NM FROM TM ORDER BY TM_ID
SELECT CD_VAL, CD_NM FROM CMN_CD WHERE CD_ID = #{cdId} ORDER BY CD_VAL
